name: LED RGB Chasing Light Module – 0.72W/12V – IP65 – 100pcs Set
description: ZION LED USA Modules are excellent for illuminating signs or outlining windows. Anyone can install these with ease because they wire directly into a standard 12V outlet with no driver required. These lights are safe for outdoor use and protected from rain, snow, and weak jets of water, such as sprinklers. LED Modules are perfect for gas stations, grocery stores, and shopping centers.
short_desc: Product Attributes: Wattage: 0.72W/module Brightness: 100 lm/module Color: RGB (Chasing with IC) Voltage: 12V AC Power Factor: ≥ 0.9 Efficacy: 130 lm/W CRI: 80+ Viewing Angle: 120° Dimmable: Yes Operating Temp: -20°C to 60°C Material: PC Housing Color: Black Lens: Clear Waterproof: IP65 Certification: UL Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 1 Year Length: 48 ft
